text: Epstein texts associate: "I'm in Stanford today" — confirms physical presence Aug 6, 2012
Epstein: "you missed bill gates. and sec gen. it was great fun" — meeting with Gates and UN Sec. Gen., Oct 17 2012
Epstein plans NY→Kiev→Oslo→Paris multi-city European trip, Oct 2012, documented in email
Maxwell departed Kosrae, Caroline Islands as outbound international passenger — remote Pacific stop.
Maxwell provided a clean laptop at MDC Brooklyn for discovery review during her case.
